sections.title: 1. General Warm-up
items: 5-Minute Row: Start with a light, steady pace to increase blood flow and warm up the major muscle groups.

sections.title: 2. Dynamic Mobility & Activation
items: Cat-Cow: Mobilizes the spine and warms up the core.
Thoracic Rotations: Improves upper back and shoulder flexibility.
Glute Bridges: Activates the glutes and posterior chain.
Leg Swings (Front/Back & Side/Side): Opens up the hips and stretches the hamstrings.
Spiderman Lunges with Thoracic Twist: Stretches hip flexors and improves rotational mobility.
Cossack Squats: A dynamic stretch for the inner thighs and groin.

sections.title: 3. Core & Rotational Power
items: Plank Variations: Builds core stability and endurance.
Heavy Cross-Body Chops: Develops explosive rotational power and core strength.
Turkish Get-ups: A full-body movement focusing on stability and coordination.
Windmills: Enhances shoulder stability, hamstring flexibility, and oblique strength.

sections.title: 4. Foundational Strength & Skill Work
items: Medium-weight Squats: A compound lift to build lower body strength and stability.
Overhead Press (OHP): Targets the shoulders and upper back.
Deadlifts (DL): A full-body posterior chain builder.
Bench Press: A foundational exercise for chest and upper body pressing power.
Hangs: Decompresses the spine and builds grip strength.
Handstands: Develops shoulder stability, core strength, and balance.

sections.title: 5. Accessory & Finishing Work
items: Wall Angels: Improves shoulder mobility and postural alignment.
Scapular Push-ups: Focuses on shoulder blade movement for better joint health.
Rotator Cuff Exercises: Prepares and strengthens the small stabilizing muscles of the shoulder joint.
Neck Exercises: Gently moves the neck through its range of motion to improve mobility and stability.
Band Pull-Aparts / Face Pulls: Activates the upper back and rear deltoids to counteract forward shoulder posture.
